name: Expense categories & input reference data
description: Expose immutable expense input reference data as global static catalogs. Backend: public/cacheable GET /api/v1/categories and GET /api/v1/sources served from checked-in code, not household data or user-managed records. Categories return stable `key`, `kind`, `iconUrl`, and `color` metadata; sources return stable keys `cash`, `bank-transfer`, `card`, `e-wallet`, and `other`. Categories are shared by all users and households, cannot be changed by end users, and may only be updated by a system administrator through code changes or DB migration work. Web: ship API layer + hooks + `category-picker` + `source-picker` + component tests only. Per docs/product-specs/expense-categorization.md. Does NOT include Add Expense UI, Quick-add UI, category CRUD, or any category default/recent/last-used logic.
evidence: Implemented global static reference-data foundation for categories/sources. Worker: added checked-in catalog, reference-data contracts, public/cacheable /api/v1/categories + /api/v1/sources routes, and unit/integration coverage (apps/worker/src/contracts/reference-data.ts, apps/worker/src/lib/reference-data/catalog.ts, apps/worker/src/routes/reference-data.ts, apps/worker/test/unit/dto-reference-data.spec.ts, apps/worker/test/integration/reference-data.spec.ts). Web: added reference-data DTOs, API endpoints/functions, React Query hooks, category/source pickers, i18n key mapping, and component/API tests (apps/web/src/types/reference-data.ts, apps/web/src/api/reference-data.ts, apps/web/src/hooks/api/use-reference-data.ts, apps/web/src/components/expense/*, apps/web/src/api/reference-data.test.ts, apps/web/src/components/expense/*.test.tsx, apps/web/src/lib/reference-data/labels.ts, apps/web/src/lib/i18n/locales/vi.json). Verification: ./init.sh (pnpm install, harness checks, lint, typecheck, tests) passed on 2026-04-29.
